elements.original_description: A glowing checkmark icon on a pure white background, symbolizing affirmation or confirmation.
elements.image_prompt: A professional 2D minimalist icon of a glowing checkmark on a pure white background, symbolizing affirmation or confirmation. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, crisp edges.

elements.original_description: A laptop screen displaying multiple website banners with 'Buy now, pay later' offers, set against a pure white background.
elements.image_prompt: A laptop screen displaying multiple website banners with 'Buy now, pay later' offers, set against a pure white background. High-quality digital illustration, sharp focus on the screen details, clean UI elements, flat vector style.
